dynamicMenu.name: Kito's Menu One
dynamicMenu.description: Kito's is where rustic tradition meets modern refinement. Born from a love of open-flame cooking and seasonal harvests, we offer an elevated yet approachable dining experience. Our kitchen prioritizes locally sourced ingredients, transforming simple elements into bold, memorable dishes.

dynamicBlock.description: Light, flavorful dishes to begin the meal and awaken the appetite.

dynamicBlock.title: Salmon tartare
dynamicBlock.description: The salmon is finely chopped and tossed in a fragrant dressing of lemon, shallots and capers. Serve with thin slices of melba toast.

dynamicBlock.title: Salt and pepper squid
dynamicBlock.description: Kick-start your dinner party with a crowd-pleasing plate of salt and pepper squid – the mix of sichuan black peppercorns gives a tingly spiciness.

dynamicBlock.title: Mo:Mo (Dumplings)
dynamicBlock.description: Serve shell-on king prawns sizzling in a pool of paprika, sherry and garlic-infused oil, with plenty of crusty bread to mop up the flavours.
